objective: Predeclare a disjoint and comparable context-diet experiment without selecting a winner or spending credits
prefetch: Measure current deterministic packet sizes and role overlays; do not inspect held-out outcomes when selecting the contract
constraints: Contracts and winner rule hash before outcomes
acceptance_criteria: Winner rule rejects any correctness regression
No winner is claimed without attended evidence
model_tier_reason: Bounded experiment-contract and deterministic analysis work with frozen product decisions
